name: express git-history lineage
source_fact: package.json::version across git tags
use: less-synthetic supersession lineage benchmark from real revision history

name: axios git-history lineage
source_fact: package.json::version across git tags

name: express git-value nonce-option lineage probe
source_fact: nonce-coded options generated from package.json::version git-history lineage rows
use: structured package-version currentness control without fixed option-label priors

name: axios git-value nonce-option lineage probe
source_fact: nonce-coded options generated from package.json::version git-history lineage rows
use: second-repo structured package-version currentness control without fixed option-label priors

name: git-value nonce-option two-repo probe
source_fact: balanced nonce-coded package-version options from Express and Axios git-history lineage rows
use: cross-repo structured currentness probe for KV value-edit replication

name: express git-doc sentence lineage
source_fact: changed natural-language documentation/changelog lines from git diffs
use: natural-language revision lineage benchmark

name: axios git-doc sentence lineage
source_fact: changed natural-language documentation lines from git diffs
use: natural-language revision lineage benchmark

name: git-doc sentence lineage two-repo probe
source_fact: first 10 doc-sentence lineage rows from each repo
use: small KV probe slice for natural-language revision lineage

name: express git-doc phrase lineage
source_fact: short changed phrases extracted from documentation/changelog diff pairs
use: more answerable natural-language revision lineage benchmark

name: axios git-doc phrase lineage
source_fact: short changed phrases extracted from documentation diff pairs
use: more answerable natural-language revision lineage benchmark

name: git-doc phrase lineage two-repo probe
source_fact: first 10 doc-phrase lineage rows from each repo
use: small KV probe slice for phrase-level natural-language revision lineage

name: express git-doc audited phrase lineage
source_fact: quality-filtered short changed phrases from documentation/changelog diff pairs
use: audited phrase-level natural-language revision lineage benchmark

name: axios git-doc audited phrase lineage
source_fact: quality-filtered short changed phrases from documentation diff pairs
use: audited phrase-level natural-language revision lineage benchmark

name: git-doc audited phrase lineage two-repo probe
source_fact: quality-filtered doc-phrase rows from the first 40 rows of each repo
use: small audited KV probe slice for phrase-level natural-language revision lineage

source_fact: changed natural-language documentation/changelog lines from git diffs
use: natural-language revision lineage benchmark

name: git-doc audited phrase lineage four-repo corpus
source_fact: quality-filtered doc-phrase rows across four real documentation histories
use: expanded audited phrase-level natural-language revision lineage corpus

name: git-doc audited phrase lineage four-repo probe
source_fact: 10 audited doc-phrase rows per repo, round-robin balanced
use: balanced four-repo audited KV probe slice

name: express git-doc option lineage
source_fact: two-option labels derived from doc-phrase lineage rows
use: option-label currentness control for natural-language revision lineage

name: axios git-doc option lineage
source_fact: two-option labels derived from doc-phrase lineage rows
use: option-label currentness control for natural-language revision lineage

name: git-doc option lineage two-repo probe
source_fact: single deterministic option assignment from the 20-row doc-phrase probe
use: small option-label currentness probe; exposed label-prior confounding

name: express git-doc balanced option lineage
source_fact: both ALPHA-current and BRAVO-current assignments for each doc-phrase row
use: label-balanced option currentness control

name: axios git-doc balanced option lineage
source_fact: both ALPHA-current and BRAVO-current assignments for each doc-phrase row
use: label-balanced option currentness control

name: git-doc balanced option lineage two-repo probe
source_fact: both option assignments for the 20-row doc-phrase probe
use: balanced option-label currentness KV probe

name: express git-doc evidence-choice lineage
source_fact: current block-id target derived from doc-phrase lineage rows
use: current-block evidence routing control

name: axios git-doc evidence-choice lineage
source_fact: current block-id target derived from doc-phrase lineage rows
use: current-block evidence routing control

name: git-doc evidence-choice lineage two-repo probe
source_fact: current block-id target for the 20-row doc-phrase probe
use: small current-block evidence-routing KV probe

name: git-doc yes/no currentness four-repo audited probe
source_fact: YES/NO currentness checks generated from balanced four-repo audited doc-phrase probe
use: non-copying yes/no currentness control for audited natural-language revision lineage

name: git-doc phrase-choice four-repo audited probe
source_fact: current/stale candidate phrases generated from balanced four-repo audited doc-phrase probe
use: candidate-phrase currentness control; useful as a suffix-reintroduction negative control

name: git-doc nonce-option four-repo audited probe
source_fact: nonce-coded currentness options generated from balanced four-repo audited doc-phrase probe
use: discriminative currentness control without fixed ALPHA/BRAVO or YES/NO label priors

name: agent-memory update nonce-option probe
source_fact: 20 stale/current assistant-memory slots balanced across order and nonce-code assignment
use: realistic stale assistant-memory currentness control for KV cache repair

name: agent-memory action probe
source_fact: 16 stale/current assistant-memory slots balanced across order and direct/task query style, with two distractor memories per item
use: locked dev/test action-oriented stale assistant-memory benchmark for KV cache repair

name: agent-memory action dev split
source_fact: 8 dev memory keys crossed with order and query style
use: policy-selection split for action-oriented stale assistant-memory KV cache repair

name: agent-memory action test split
source_fact: 8 held-out memory keys crossed with order and query style
use: held-out evaluation split for action-oriented stale assistant-memory KV cache repair

name: agent-memory messy multi-update probe
source_fact: 10 memory keys with older/middle/current updates, varied memory-key wording, order variants, query styles, and distractor memories
use: less-templated multi-update stale assistant-memory targeting benchmark

name: agent-memory messy multi-update dev split
source_fact: 5 dev memory keys with older/middle/current updates crossed with order and query style
use: policy-development split for less-templated multi-update assistant-memory repair

name: agent-memory messy multi-update test split
source_fact: 5 held-out memory keys with older/middle/current updates crossed with order and query style
use: held-out less-templated multi-update assistant-memory targeting and model-currentness benchmark

name: agent-memory long-context test8
source: inflated from agent-memory action test split
source_fact: 8 held-out action-memory cases with 96 unrelated memory distractors per item and intact stale/current target lineage
use: long persistent-cache latency benchmark for prompt-deletion versus KV repair

name: agent-memory long-context d48-s4 test4
source: inflated from agent-memory action test split
source_fact: 4 held-out action-memory cases with 48 unrelated memory distractors per item and intact stale/current target lineage
use: feasible long-context smoke benchmark for persistent-cache latency on local CPU

name: agent-memory long-context d48-s4 test8
source: inflated from agent-memory action test split
source_fact: 8 held-out action-memory cases with 48 unrelated memory distractors per item and intact stale/current target lineage
use: expanded feasible long-context persistent-cache latency benchmark on local CPU

name: agent-memory long-context d48-s4 test32
source: inflated from agent-memory action test split
source_fact: full 32-row held-out action-memory test split with 48 unrelated memory distractors per item and intact stale/current target lineage
use: full held-out long-context persistent-cache benchmark for 7B MLX field-impact validation

name: memory-store lineage demo
source_fact: one superseded/current weekly-review memory update with unrelated current memories and a ledger-generated cache edit plan
use: real memory-store lineage prototype for cache repair planning and provenance repair

name: agent-memory long-context d230-s4 test4
source: inflated from agent-memory action test split
source_fact: 4 held-out action-memory cases with 230 unrelated memory distractors per item, about 31.3k total tokens per case

name: agent-memory exact-32k d236-s4 test2
source: inflated from agent-memory action test split
source_fact: 2 held-out action-memory cases with 236 unrelated memory distractors per item, about 32.1k total tokens per case
use: exact-32k persistent-cache latency validation for 7B MLX field-impact evidence

name: stale-memory repair public benchmark v1
source: combined public release from agent-memory update, action, and messy multi-update suites
source_fact: 80 update_nonce_option cases, 64 action cases, and 40 messy_multi_update cases with 224 total stale memory records
use: public stale-memory KV-cache repair benchmark and targeting-audit release

name: stale-memory universality traces v1
source: combined public release benchmark plus public Git-history document-revision traces
source_fact: 184 assistant-memory rows plus 80 public Git-history rows from express, axios, flask, and requests; 304 total stale memory/revision records
use: mixed generated plus less-generated public trace benchmark for stale-memory universality checks
